## Visium

### preamble

```{r load-libs}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(SpatialData)
library(SpatialData.data)
library(SpatialData.plot)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
```

```{r load-data}
(sd <- MouseBrainVis())
```

### analysis

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
# TODO: low-res. images miss coordTrans altogether, 
# leading to failure; handle this case or fix data?

# TODO: HnE visualization seems broken; 
# needs fixing in SpatialData.plot

n <- length(s <- shape(sd))
shape(sd, "spots") <- s[sample(n, 333)]
cl <- rep(list(c(0, 1/3)), 3)
plotSpatialData() +  
    plotImage(sd, cl=cl) +
    plotShape(sd, "spots", col="red")
```

```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=3}
# TODO: shapes are fine on their own but not overlaid
bb <- list(xmin=600, xmax=1800, ymin=1200, ymax=1600)
shape(sd, "box") <- crop(shape(sd), bb)
plotSpatialData() +
    #plotImage(sd, cl=cl) +
    plotShape(sd, "box", col="red")
```

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=5}
(se <- tables(sd)[[1]])
plotSpatialData() + plotShape(sd, colour="array_col") +
plotSpatialData() + plotShape(sd, colour="Map2") +
plot_layout(nrow=1) & scale_colour_viridis_c()
```

### appendix

::: {.callout-note icon=false, collapse=true}

### session

```{r sess-info}
sessionInfo()
```

:::
